name: Eldorado Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Eldorado Courts in Santa Fe, NM! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are private.

name: Forked Lightning Racquet Club
description: Guests must be accompanied by a member.

name: Fort Marcy Park
description: Fort Marcy Park is a place to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Fort Marcy Recreation complex
description: Come play pickleball at Fort Marcy Recreation complex in Santa Fe, NM! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include water and trainers or lessons. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Open play daily in the a.m.'s and evening; club events 12 - 5

name: Genoveva Chavez Community Center
description: Genoveva Chavez Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: New Mexico School of the Arts
description: Come play pickleball at New Mexico School of the Arts in Santa Fe, NM! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: Romero Park
description: Romero Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Salvador Perez Park
description: Salvador Perez Park is a place to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Santa Fe Community College
description: Santa Fe Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Santa Fe Tennis and Swim Club
description: Santa Fe Tennis and Swim Club is a place to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: The Club At Las Campanas
description: The Club At Las Campanas is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: William C. Witter Fitness Education Center
description: William C. Witter Fitness Education Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Santa Fe, NM. There are 8 indoor wood courts.
